hero.title: Find your next partner, not just another hire
hero.subtitle: You haven't listed a partnership yet — this is where you learn how it works, then choose the track that fits: offer funding and structure to a partner, or bring an early-stage builder in on pure experience.

videoModal.caption: [ video: how startup partnerships work · 3 min ]

share.title: Share your needs
share.desc: The role, skills, and equity or funding you can offer a partner.

matched.title: Get matched
matched.desc: We surface candidates whose skills fit what you need.

seminar.title: Seminar or meetup
seminar.desc: Meet shortlisted candidates through an invited session.

partner.title: Partner & build together
partner.desc: Work together and document the outcomes for both sides.

cta.heading: Want us to notify you?
cta.body: Show interest and we'll notify you the moment a matching partner is available.
cta.thanks: Thanks — we'll notify you when a matching partner is available ✓

profile.title: Company profile
profile.subtitle: Complete these verification details so admins can review and approve your account.
profile.loadError: Could not load your company profile.
profile.completeBanner: Complete your company profile below to start posting jobs and contacting candidates. You can still browse and search candidates in the meantime.
profile.pendingBanner: Your company profile is awaiting admin verification. You can browse and search candidates in the meantime, but can't post jobs or contact candidates yet.
profile.rejectedBanner: Your company verification was rejected. Update your details below and resubmit for review.
profile.verifiedBanner: Your company is verified — you can post jobs and contact candidates.
profile.saveError: Could not save your company details.

dashboard.title: Employer dashboard
dashboard.completeProfileBanner: Complete your company profile to start posting jobs and contacting candidates.

myJobPostings.title: My job postings
myJobPostings.subtitle: Track every job you've posted, in one place.
myJobPostings.loadError: Could not load your job postings.
myJobPostings.empty: You haven't posted any jobs yet.
myJobPostings.pendingReviewNotice: This job is awaiting admin review — you can't edit it until that's done.

postJob.errorTitleRequired: Enter a job title before saving a draft.
postJob.notEligibleTitle: You can't post a job yet
postJob.notEligibleBody: Complete your company profile and wait for admin verification before posting a job. You can still search candidates in the meantime.
postJob.title: Post a job
postJob.subtitle: Reach candidates directly — and surface your listing to skill-matched partnership and community applicants too.

fields.aboutRolePlaceholder: Describe the role, team, and what success looks like...

postJob.requiredSkillsBody: Technical or soft — used to match this role to relevant candidates, and to surface it to skilled partnership/community applicants.
postJob.matchNotice: Candidates who match these skills but haven't landed similar roles will also see this listing alongside relevant startup partnerships and community opportunities.

searchCandidates.contactDisabledHint: Complete your company profile and get admin-verified before contacting candidates.
searchCandidates.searchPlaceholder: Search by skill, title, or keyword
searchCandidates.noResults: No candidates match your filters. Try clearing some filters or searching a different keyword.

seminars.title: Seminars & meetups
seminars.subtitle: Invite partnership applicants to meet the team before you decide.
seminars.notifyNotice: Invitees get both an email and a WhatsApp notification automatically.

billing.title: Billing & plans
billing.currentPlan: Your company is currently on the {{plan}} plan.

growth.name: Growth
features: Contact candidates directly for 1 month per search
